allow: Bash(node -e "const { PrismaClient } = require\(''./node_modules/.prisma/client''\); const p = new PrismaClient\(\); p.user.findUnique\({ where: { email: ''test3@example.com'' } }\).then\(u => console.log\(JSON.stringify\(u\)\)\).catch\(e => console.error\(e.message\)\).finally\(\(\) => p.$disconnect\(\)\);")

Bash(npx tsx -e "import { prisma } from ''./app/lib/prisma''; const u = await prisma.user.findUnique\({ where: { email: ''test3@example.com'' } }\); console.log\(u ? ''found: '' + u.id : ''NOT found''\); await prisma.$disconnect\(\);")
